description:
You are the release manager preparing a deployment.  
A raw application log already exists at:  
/home/user/release/logs/deploy-2023-10-01.log  

Goal  
1. Read that log and isolate every line that simultaneously contains the exact, case-sensitive tokens “[ERROR] [payment-service]”.  
2. Write those matching lines, in the original order, to a new file called  
/home/user/release/filtered/payment-errors.log  

Technical requirements the automated checker will verify  
• The directory /home/user/release/filtered/ must exist when you finish.  
• /home/user/release/filtered/payment-errors.log must exist and be world-readable (chmod 644 or more open).  
• payment-errors.log must contain ONLY the matching lines, with no extra blank lines, spaces, or header text.  
• The file must end with a single newline character.  
• There must be exactly two lines in the file, each identical to the corresponding line in the source log.  
• No other files in /home/user/release/filtered/ should be created or modified.  

Hint (not a prescription): one pipeline using grep with an extended regular expression is enough.
truth:
Initial state provided by the test harness  
1. File: /home/user/release/logs/deploy-2023-10-01.log  
   Permissions: 644  
   Contents (5 lines, each ending with “\n”):  
     2023-10-01T02:15:43Z [INFO] [user-service] Deployed successfully  
     2023-10-01T02:17:01Z [ERROR] [payment-service] NullPointer exception at PaymentProcessor.java:87  
     2023-10-01T02:18:22Z [WARN] [inventory-service] Slow response detected  
     2023-10-01T02:19:55Z [ERROR] [payment-service] Timeout while contacting bank API  
     2023-10-01T02:20:01Z [INFO] [payment-service] Health check passed  

Expected final state for verification  
1. Directory /home/user/release/filtered/ exists (mode >= 755).  
2. File /home/user/release/filtered/payment-errors.log exists (mode >= 644) with exactly the two lines below, each terminated by “\n”, and nothing else:  
     2023-10-01T02:17:01Z [ERROR] [payment-service] NullPointer exception at PaymentProcessor.java:87  
     2023-10-01T02:19:55Z [ERROR] [payment-service] Timeout while contacting bank API  

No other files or content changes are evaluated.
